title: Monday.com extremely slow in mainland china
excerpt:
Hello, 
Does anyone know, if Monday.com has regional servers in mainland and specifically southern China. Our office folks in Xiamen complain that it is basically not useable?(And yes they sit on a fancy business grade f…

posts.author: maxzettler (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Does anyone know, if Monday.com has regional servers in mainland and specifically southern China. Our office folks in Xiamen complain that it is basically not useable?(And yes they sit on a fancy business grade fiber internet connection).

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @maxzettler

Welcome to the community! Do you know which browser is used? Since the last Google Chrome update I noticed Chrome puts a extreme high load on cpu and memory when using monday.com. I switched to Edge and the problem is gone.
